title: swertia columbiana f. albida
intro: Swertia columbiana f. albida is a rare, albino variant of the Swertia columbiana plant, a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter compounds which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Swertia columbiana f. albida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
